title: Identify the most popular sites & assess oversharing
insight: In SharePoint admin center, under active sites, sort sites descending by "page visits" to find the most used sites in your organization. Export the results to a CSV to cross reference with oversharing reports generated using SAM and DSPM for AI.
userImpactRationale: Read-only reporting; no user-facing change

title: Run Data Access Governance Permission state report
insight: Run and export the SAM Data Access Governance Permission state report, which gives a list of all sites showing: number of people with permissions, Purview sensitivity label applied, and the privacy setting of the site.
userImpactRationale: Admin report only

title: Gain visibility into all data at risk of Copilot access
insight: Run the Purview DSPM for AI Data assessment to gain visibility into all data at risk of Copilot access. This report includes the sites users have access to, total number of users, amount of sensitive data, sensitivity labels applied, and the quantity of dark data.
userImpactRationale: Admin report only

title: Turn off EEEU (everyone except external users)
insight: Turn off EEEU (everyone except external users) at the tenant level. If content is shared using this type of user group, it is likely overshared and should be reviewed. This will be a quick change that immediately stops some of the oversharing in your organization.
userImpactRationale: Users can no longer select EEEU when sharing; forces explicit recipient selection. Existing EEEU-shared content remains but no new broad sharing.

title: Turn on Copilot interactions auditing
insight: Turn on Microsoft Purview Audit to see user activity then review the users' Copilot interactions with activity reports and charts in Purview DSPM for AI.
userImpactRationale: Background audit; invisible to users

title: Monitor sensitive data in Copilot prompts and responses
insight: Turn on proactive analysis with Microsoft Purview Communication Compliance to monitor sensitive data in Copilot prompts and responses.
userImpactRationale: Communication Compliance runs in background; users only impacted if flagged

title: Detect when sensitive content is shared externally
insight: Turn on SharePoint Purview DLP policy in simulation mode to detect when sensitive content is shared externally. This allows identifying potential oversharing incidents without immediately blocking the sharing action.
userImpactRationale: Simulation mode — no blocking, just detection

title: Initiate access review for all sites identified as overshared
insight: Initiate access review for all sites identified as overshared in the SAM and DSPM for AI Data assessments. During the access review process, site owners and admin can examine permissions on their sites and files to identify oversharing or inappropriate access.
userImpactRationale: Site owners receive review notifications and must act; some users may lose access

title: Enable Restricted Access Control (RAC)
insight: While sites are in Access Review, optionally lock down content with SAM Restricted Access Control (RAC). Ensure only authorized users have access to sensitive information by defining which users or groups should have access to specific sites, libraries, or documents.
userImpactRationale: Immediately restricts site access to defined group; users outside lose access

title: Enable Restricted Content Discovery (RCD)
insight: To restrict overshared sites from Copilot access and/or processing, optionally use Restricted Content Discovery (RCD). This will restrict Copilot from discovering these sites.
userImpactRationale: Content hidden from Copilot; users can still access directly but won't find via Copilot

title: Enable content sensitivity labels
insight: Define and publish sensitivity labels with Purview Information Protection to Office apps, containers/sites, and Outlook for manual data protection. Copilot adheres to sensitivity labels and enforces protection policies on content created based on classified data.
userImpactRationale: Users must learn to apply labels manually in Office apps; workflow change

title: Prevent Copilot from processing content (Knowledge Source)
insight: Create Data Loss Prevention policies to exclude files with specific sensitivity labels from Copilot processing. This allows scoping out labels such as one for mergers & acquisitions while working through restrictions at the site level.
userImpactRationale: Labeled content excluded from Copilot responses; users get fewer/different results

title: Prevent Copilot from processing content (Prompt)
insight: Create a DLP policy to restrict prompt processing when sensitive information types (SITs) are detected, preventing Copilot from generating responses or handling sensitive data.
userImpactRationale: Copilot blocks responses when SITs detected; users may see 'can't process' messages

title: Enable containers sensitivity labels
insight: Apply Purview Information Protection container sensitivity labels to sites to define sensitivity and enforce privacy settings. Setting the site to "Private" will limit content access to people with explicit access.
userImpactRationale: End users must manually select sensitivity label when provisioning new sites/Teams. Existing containers labeled automatically via scripting.

title: Apply default library labels for consistent protection
insight: After applying container sensitivity labels, set up default library labels to ensure that all new and modified documents are automatically labeled. This helps maintain consistent data protection and prevents oversharing.
userImpactRationale: Documents auto-labeled; mostly transparent but may trigger encryption/restrictions

title: Restrict access to sensitive data via DLP
insight: Turn on the oversharing SPO DLP policy to restrict users' access to sensitive data.
userImpactRationale: Active DLP enforcement blocks users from accessing/sharing sensitive data

title: Adjustment of global link settings
insight: Configure default sharing policy to "Specific People" to ensure sharing links are scoped to named individuals rather than broad audiences.
userImpactRationale: Changes default sharing behavior; users must name recipients instead of broad links

title: Enable integration with Microsoft Entra B2B for guest access
insight: Enable the integration between SharePoint/OneDrive and Microsoft Entra B2B for guest access to centralize external identity management.
userImpactRationale: Fundamentally changes how users invite and collaborate with external guests; all guest access routed through B2B onboarding

title: Restrict sharing settings to "Existing guests" only
insight: Limit the organization-level external sharing setting to "Existing guests" only, preventing ad-hoc guest invitations.
userImpactRationale: Users can no longer invite new external guests ad-hoc; must go through formal B2B process. Combined with #18, significantly impacts external collaboration.

title: Restrict guests' sharing settings
insight: Disable "Allow guests to share items they don't own" for SharePoint and OneDrive to prevent lateral sharing by external users.
userImpactRationale: Only impacts external guests, not internal users

title: Pilot the new "Site lifecycle policies"
insight: Replaces group expiry policies with an "Inactive site policy". Site owners receive notifications and determine disposition on an ongoing basis.
userImpactRationale: Site owners receive notifications for inactive sites; action required only for stale sites

title: Implement Data retention policies
insight: Define a data retention strategy aligned with internal requirements and regulations. Implement global retention policy and use Purview retention labels for granular policies based on content and aligned with global and local regulations.
userImpactRationale: Content auto-deleted based on age; users may lose access to older documents

title: Improve Copilot responses
insight: Reduce obsolete files and sites to reduce oversharing surface and improve Copilot response accuracy. Run SAM Site lifecycle management inactive sites policy, and create Purview Data Lifecycle Management deletion policies based on last modified or created date.
userImpactRationale: Background cleanup of old content; minimal daily impact

title: Develop a "Top-secret" or equivalent label
insight: This label would enforce strict sharing and access settings: setting the site to Private, disabling external sharing, mandatory meeting labelling, and access from managed devices only.
userImpactRationale: Strict encryption, mandatory labeling, managed-device-only access; significant workflow change

title: Enforce restrictive DLP policies for highly sensitive sites
insight: Enforce additional restrictive DLP controls to highly sensitive content to prevent data leakage from confidential sites.
userImpactRationale: Active blocking of sharing/access on confidential sites

title: Detect and investigate non-compliant Copilot interactions
insight: Use Purview Communication Compliance to detect, investigate, and remediate non-compliant use in AI interactions including those in copilots, agents, and AI apps.
userImpactRationale: Background monitoring; users only impacted when flagged
